name: rss-feeds-mcp
description: Fetch, filter, and search RSS feeds through Claude — monitor blogs, track industry news, and research content.

tools.name: list_feeds
tools.description: List all configured RSS feeds with their categories

tools.name: add_feed
tools.description: Add a new RSS feed with name, URL, and category

tools.name: remove_feed
tools.description: Remove an RSS feed by name

tools.name: fetch_blogs
tools.description: Fetch latest posts from all feeds with date range and limit

tools.name: fetch_from_source
tools.description: Fetch posts from a specific named source

tools.name: search_blogs
tools.description: Search across all feeds by keyword
